item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly separates the long-term AI trend from the proposed immediate organizational action, blocks the irreversible move of dissolving QA, downgrades it to QA role redesign and AI-assisted pilots, and gives trigger metrics such as defect escape rate, regression time, false positives, maintenance cost, and incident rate before scaling changes. It does not merely agree or disagree, and it avoids method stacking."}
